SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-05-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELL, SHANIKA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AHMAD, MASSDJEDI/LUXOR CAB LUXOR CAB/AHMAD MASSDJEDI $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,595.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES IN THE SUM OF (1) $5046.47 REPRESENTING THE DIFFERENCE BETWEEN PLAINTIFF'S USUAL WAGES AND WORKER'S COMPENSATION TEMPORARY DISABILITY BENEFITS; AND (2) $2453.53 AS GENERAL DAMAGES FOR PLAINTIFF'S PAIN AND SUFFERING FOR BODILY INJURIES.
